case_title: WILLIAM YEE VS. CONARD HOUSE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT AND PERMITTING ENTRY OF DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. A NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. A NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BASED ON STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, WILLIAM
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT AND PERMITTING ENTRY OF DISMISSAL JUDGMENT OF SEP-30-2002 SET ASIDE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. A NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $36.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, WILLIAM
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. A NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, WILLIAM ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. A NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. A NON-PROFIT CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1167 BROADWAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOC
